titleStmt.title: SII 26.136: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 136. (A.R. No. 128 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This inscription records the royal order, addressed to two individuals informing them of the gift of land to Nārāṇa-dāsaṉ of Vaṉkurugūr for maintaining a flower-garden dedicated to the god Emberumāṉ Vēdanāyaka-perumāḷ of Tirunārāyaṇapuram for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Irājakesari ḥ—etat sarvvamahīpālamakuṭaissattam dhṛtam . virarājentradevasya śāsanam śrī karambhuvi . koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ Ulakamuṇṭāṉ bhaṭṭassomaiyāji makaṉ nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaṉukku nam Ōlai kuṭutta paṭiyāvatu bhaṭṭaṉ makaṉum
peraṉum varmiyāy Ōṭippoṉamaiyil Avaṉ nilam nammutāyaṉṉilam Iṉṉārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaṉukku nāṅkuṭuttamaiyil Ivaṉ tamappaṉ Ulakamuṇṭāṉ bhaṭṭa ssomaiyāji namakku naṉṟākat tirunārāyaṇapurattu Emperumāṉ vetanāyakap
perumāḷukku vaṉkurukūr nārāyaṇadāsaṉai Iṭṭaṭu muṉpu ceyvittu varukiṟa tiru nan=tavaṉattukku jivitamākaviṭṭa nilamāvatu virakeraḷavaḷanāṭṭu viranārāyaṇac caruppetimaṅkalattu śrīteviakarattu virakeraḷamaṉṉaṟaiyil nilam Araimāraikkaā
ṇikku Ellaiyāvatu cempiyaṉ kiḻānaṭivatikku vaṭakkum virakeraḷavāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum maṭattukkuk kiḻai Attippoyiṟkiḻ nilam Araimāvum Immaṉṉaṟaiyil Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakku Ivvāykkālukkuk kiḻakku viḷāvoṭuyeriyil kiḻ nilam Arai
kāṇiyum Ākaṉṉilam Araimāvaraikkāṇiyum Ariyavaiceytacoḻamaṉṉaraiyil cempiyaṉ mukkokkiḻāṉṉaṭi vāykkālukkut teṟku Avaṉimāṇikka vāykkālukku meṟku Ivvāykkāl kiḻnilam Araikkāṇiyum Āka maṉṉaṟai Iraṇṭiṉāl
mukkāṇiyum naṉṉaṉūril nilam Orumāvukku Ellaiyāvatu viranārāyaṇapperuvāykkāl kiḻ Aticeyacoḻamaṉṉaṟaiyil viranāraṇavatikkuk kiḻakkum virakeraḷa vāykkālukkut teṟku mutal kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcaturattu vaṭakiḻk kaṭaiyan nilam Oru mā
Ākaṉilam Orumāmukkāṇiyum Iṟai puravu siddhāyam Elavai Ukavai maṟṟum Ēṟppeṟpaṭṭituṅkoḷḷātomākavum Ittirunantavaṉam vaṉkurukūr nārāṇadāsaṉum Ivaṉ makkaḷ makkaḷuñ ceytuvaruvārkaḷāka nam Olai kuṭuttom Ivai
Eḻuttu Ivai brahmappallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu ḥ§
Digital edition of SII 26.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
